rules.message_template: Your review is too short. Founder reviews must include specific details to be credible.
rules.google_justification: Professional service reviews need detail to carry authority weight
rules.actionable_advice: Describe: what service, what outcome, what went well, what could improve

rules.message_template: Reviews with 200+ words perform best for professional services
rules.google_justification: Longer, detailed content signals expertise and authority
rules.actionable_advice: Add a specific outcome with dates, amounts, or measurable results

rules.message_template: Name the specific vendor or professional service you used
rules.google_justification: Named entities help Google understand the relationship context
rules.actionable_advice: Example: 'Hired Smith Law for trademark filing' not just 'legal services'

rules.message_template: What was the specific outcome or result?
rules.google_justification: Outcome-focused content aligns with commercial search intent
rules.actionable_advice: Example: 'They saved me $5,000 on taxes' or 'The trademark was approved in 4 months'

rules.message_template: Include specific numbers (dates, amounts, timeframes) to build credibility
rules.google_justification: Verifiable data points increase E-E-A-T for professional content

rules.message_template: Mention your incubator affiliation if relevant
rules.google_justification: Incubator verification adds authority to the reviewer
rules.actionable_advice: Example: 'As a founder in Rockville Seed Fund, I needed...'

rules.message_template: Balanced reviews (pros and cons) are most trusted by other founders
rules.google_justification: B2B decision-makers expect balanced, honest assessments
rules.actionable_advice: List one strength AND one constructive observation

rules.message_template: You must disclose if you received any discount or free service for this review
rules.google_justification: FTC requires disclosure; platform policy requires it for founder reviews
rules.actionable_advice: Check the disclosure box. Honest disclosure protects your reputation.

rules.message_template: You are repeating the same word or phrase too often
rules.google_justification: Google's spam detection flags unnatural repetition
rules.actionable_advice: Try using synonyms or restating naturally

rules.message_template: Avoid ALL CAPS, multiple exclamation marks (!!!), or question marks (???)
rules.google_justification: Excessive punctuation is a spam signal
rules.actionable_advice: Write naturally, as if speaking to a fellow founder

rules.message_template: This review will appear on your public founder profile and may help your SEO
rules.google_justification: Founder profiles with structured data and reviews may earn backlink authority
rules.actionable_advice: A detailed review helps you build portable reputation across incubators

do_tips: Address specific concerns with data or timelines
Respond within 24 hours (founders expect faster replies)
dont_tips: Argue with specific claims — provide facts instead
Ignore negative reviews (B2B reputation is critical)
Dispute founder's incubator affiliation or credibility
